title: More Nonsense Limerick 60
content:
There was an old man of West Dumpet,
    Who possessed a large nose like a trumpet;
    When he blew it aloud, 
    It astonished the crowd,
    And was heard through the whole of West Dumpet.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "More Nonsense Limerick 60", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
